news.title:
6 Nifty 500 stocks with consistent 2025 PAT growth fell up to 35% YTD, despite earnings momentum.
Aegis Vopak, SBFC, IOB, and Muthoot Finance face pressures from rising crude, inflation, and market volatility.
news.summary:

news.title:
Muthoot Finance may see USD 49M inflows from Nifty semi-annual rejig.
Shares likely reacting to the 3 PM index rebalancing announcement today.
news.summary:

news.title:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.
news.summary:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.

news.title:
Mid, smallcap indices plunged; Nifty Midcap 100 fell 3.5% and Nifty Smallcap 100 dropped 3.8%.
Stocks like Muthoot Finance, Voltas, SAIL, Paytm, and Firstcry declined over 5% amid global geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Mid, smallcap indices plunged; Nifty Midcap 100 fell 3.5% and Nifty Smallcap 100 dropped 3.8%.
Stocks like Muthoot Finance, Voltas, SAIL, Paytm, and Firstcry declined over 5% amid global geopolitical tensions.

news.title: Muthoot Finance and Manappuram shares fell up to 5% on Monday.
news.summary: Muthoot Finance and Manappuram shares fell up to 5% on Monday.

news.title:
Manappuram, Muthoot Finance, and CSB Bank shares fell up to 5% due to gold price drops.
Gold corrected 11% last week, its steepest drop since 1983, falling 15% in a month.
news.summary:
Manappuram, Muthoot Finance, and CSB Bank shares fell up to 5% due to gold price drops.

news.title:
RBI clarifies no leadership curbs for NBFCs; Shriram Finance rises 2.4%, Bajaj Finance up 2.9% before reversing.
LIC Housing, Muthoot, Jio Financial gained 0.5%-2.5%; relief for NBFCs amid global market challenges and crude price spikes.
news.summary:
RBI clarifies no leadership curbs for NBFCs; Shriram Finance rises 2.4%, Bajaj Finance up 2.9% before reversing.
LIC Housing, Muthoot, Jio Financial gained 0.5%-2.5%; relief for NBFCs amid global market challenges and crude price spikes.

news.title:
Indian firms sought $5.33B via ECBs and FCCBs in Jan '26, FY26's peak.
NBFCs were among the notable applicants to RBI for these fundraising proposals.
news.summary:

news.title:
IOC reported 200% EBITDA growth in Q3 FY26, driven by better profitability per barrel.
Muthoot Finance saw 78% EBITDA growth due to gold loan expansion; BPCL margins rose 55% from refining economics.
news.summary:

news.title:
Gold loans see a 90% surge, driving India's retail credit boom per CRIF High Mark report.
Indians increasingly leverage gold for financing, moving beyond traditional storage.
news.summary:

news.title:
India Inc's Q3FY26 profits rose 14.7% YoY, highest in 8 quarters.
Growth driven by public OMCs, banks, non-bank lenders, and metals/mining firms.
news.summary:

news.summary: Muthoot Finance faces pressure despite delivering strong Q3 performance.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance shares dropped 12% despite a sharp profit rise in Q3.
The stock traded at ₹3,598.4, near its day low of ₹3,577, versus ₹4,066.9 prior close.
news.summary:

news.title:
Muthoot Finance raises gold loan AUM guidance to 45 from 36; tonnage stable.
Current LTV at 57%; minor corrections possible but gold prices expected to stay high.
news.summary:

news.title:
Muthoot Finance's consolidated loan AUM rose 48% YoY to ₹1,64,720 Cr; standalone AUM up 51% to ₹1,47,552 Cr.
Consolidated PAT surged 84% YoY to ₹7,209 Cr; gold loan AUM increased 50% YoY to ₹1,39,658 Cr.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance's consolidated loan AUM rose 48% YoY to ₹1,64,720 Cr; standalone AUM up 51% to ₹1,47,552 Cr.
Consolidated PAT surged 84% YoY to ₹7,209 Cr; gold loan AUM increased 50% YoY to ₹1,39,658 Cr.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance Q3 net profit rose to 26.6B vs 13.6B YoY, beating 23.2B estimate.
Revenue surged to 72B from 44B YoY, reflecting strong growth in Q3 performance.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance Q3 net profit rose to 26.6B vs 13.6B YoY, beating 23.2B estimate.

news.title:
Tata Motors CV, HDFC AMC, Muthoot Finance, and others are potential inclusions in Nifty Next 50 during March rejig, replacing stocks like Info Edge and JSW Energy.
Tata Motors CV inclusion could see $143M inflows; exclusions like Bajaj Housing may lead to $14M-$80M outflows per Nuvama Alternative.
news.summary:
Tata Motors CV, HDFC AMC, Muthoot Finance, and others are potential inclusions in Nifty Next 50 during March rejig, replacing stocks like Info Edge and JSW Energy.
Tata Motors CV inclusion could see $143M inflows; exclusions like Bajaj Housing may lead to $14M-$80M outflows per Nuvama Alternative.
